(*[Namibia Football Association](/wiki/Namibia_Football_Association "Namibia Football Association") Cup*), officially **Bidvest Namibia Cup**, is an [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") tournament for [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") clubs.[[1]](http://www.bidvestnamibia.com.na/downloads/Bidvest_Cup_Press_Release.pdf)[*[permanent dead link](/wiki/Wikipedia:Link_rot "Wikipedia:Link rot")*]

["African edge Gunners to win Debmarine Namibia Cup - Namibia Football Association"](https://web.archive.org/web/20171204223145/http://www.nfa.org.na/?q=node/4194). Archived from the original on 2017-12-04. Retrieved 2023-05-11.`{{cite web}}`: CS1 maint: bot: original URL status unknown ([link](/wiki/Category:CS1_maint:_bot:_original_URL_status_unknown "Category:CS1 maint: bot: original URL status unknown"))

Football tournament

Namibia FA Cup

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Founded | 1990 |
| Current champions | [FC Civics](/wiki/FC_Civics "FC Civics") |
| *[2024 Namibia FA Cup](/w/index.php?title=2024_Namibia_FA_Cup&action=edit&redlink=1 "2024 Namibia FA Cup (page does not exist)")* | |

The **Namibia FA Cup** (*[Namibia Football Association](/wiki/Namibia_Football_Association "Namibia Football Association") Cup*), officially **Bidvest Namibia Cup**, is an [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") tournament for [Namibian](/wiki/Namibia "Namibia") clubs.[[1]](http://www.bidvestnamibia.com.na/downloads/Bidvest_Cup_Press_Release.pdf)[*[permanent dead link](/wiki/Wikipedia:Link_rot "Wikipedia:Link rot")*]

The competition was relaunched in 2024, following a number of years of inactivity due to the unavailability of a sponsor, after the Namibian Football Association agreed a deal with PstBet.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Previous Champions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_FA_Cup&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Previous Champions")]

* 1990: [Black Africa F.C.](/wiki/Black_Africa_F.C. "Black Africa F.C.") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 1991: [Chief Santos](/wiki/Chief_Santos "Chief Santos") ([Tsumeb](/wiki/Tsumeb "Tsumeb"))
* 1992: [Liverpool](/wiki/Liverpool_Okahandja "Liverpool Okahandja") ([Okahandja](/wiki/Okahandja "Okahandja"))
* 1993: [Black Africa F.C.](/wiki/Black_Africa_F.C. "Black Africa F.C.") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 1994: [Blue Waters](/wiki/Blue_Waters_F.C. "Blue Waters F.C.") ([Walvis Bay](/wiki/Walvis_Bay "Walvis Bay"))
* 1995: [Tigers](/wiki/United_Africa_Tigers "United Africa Tigers") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 1996: [Tigers](/wiki/United_Africa_Tigers "United Africa Tigers") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 1997: *not contested*
* 1998: [Chief Santos](/wiki/Chief_Santos "Chief Santos") ([Tsumeb](/wiki/Tsumeb "Tsumeb"))
* 1999: [Chief Santos](/wiki/Chief_Santos "Chief Santos") ([Tsumeb](/wiki/Tsumeb "Tsumeb"))
* 2000: [Chief Santos](/wiki/Chief_Santos "Chief Santos") ([Tsumeb](/wiki/Tsumeb "Tsumeb"))
* 2001: *not contested*
* 2002: [Orlando Pirates](/wiki/Orlando_Pirates_Windhoek "Orlando Pirates Windhoek") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2003: [FC Civics](/wiki/FC_Civics "FC Civics") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2004: [Black Africa F.C.](/wiki/Black_Africa_F.C. "Black Africa F.C.") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2005: [Ramblers](/wiki/Ramblers_FC "Ramblers FC") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2006: [Orlando Pirates](/wiki/Orlando_Pirates_Windhoek "Orlando Pirates Windhoek") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2007: [African Stars](/wiki/African_Stars "African Stars") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2008: [FC Civics](/wiki/FC_Civics "FC Civics") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2009: [Orlando Pirates](/wiki/Orlando_Pirates_Windhoek "Orlando Pirates Windhoek") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2010: [African Stars](/wiki/African_Stars "African Stars") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2011: [Eleven Arrows F.C.](/wiki/Eleven_Arrows_F.C. "Eleven Arrows F.C.") ([Walvis Bay](/wiki/Walvis_Bay "Walvis Bay"))
* 2012: *not held*
* 2013: [African Stars](/wiki/African_Stars "African Stars") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2014: [African Stars](/wiki/African_Stars "African Stars") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2015: [Tigers](/wiki/United_Africa_Tigers "United Africa Tigers") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2016: *not held*
* 2017: [Young African F.C.](/wiki/Young_Africans_F.C._(Namibia) "Young Africans F.C. (Namibia)")[[2]](#cite_note-2017_cup-2)
* [2018](/wiki/2018_Namibia_FA_Cup "2018 Namibia FA Cup"): [African Stars](/wiki/African_Stars "African Stars") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))[[3]](#cite_note-3)
* 2019: *not held*
* 2020: *not held*
* 2021: [FC Civics](/wiki/FC_Civics "FC Civics") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))
* 2022: *not held*
* 2023: *not held*
* 2024: [African Stars](/wiki/African_Stars "African Stars") ([Windhoek](/wiki/Windhoek "Windhoek"))

### Most titles

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Namibia_FA_Cup&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Most titles")]
